title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Mink Fluffy Blanket, Soft and Cosy Thermal Throw For Sofas, Cuddle Warm Throws For Beds, Teal, 150 x 200 cm
features: SUMPTUOUSLY SOFT BED THROW: This beautiful throw blanket for the bed or settee is expertly crafted to be highly durable as well as fabulously soft against your skin.
WARM AND COSY: Ultra-light and breathable fluffy faux fur throw, this stunning plain sofa throw blanket is the ideal companion for cold winter nights.
EXQUISITELY CRAFTED: The greatest of care and high-quality material are used in the manufacture of this blanket for the sofa, and bed ideal for winter.
EASY CARE FLUFFY BLANKETS: This fabulous thermal blanket is the update to the furnishings you have been looking for.
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
